_comment: Shaded-figure demo: a Spearmen regiment and a Cavalry regiment stand side by side (drill mode, no opponent) under a tight camera past the figure-LOD threshold, so every soldier renders as a detailed silhouette -- now with per-part vertex-colour shading (lit heads and spearheads, darker legs, kit contrast) and a soft contact shadow under each figure. The spearmen are then ordered on a short eastward march so the shading and shadows read in motion as ranks advance; the cavalry stand as the mounted comparison. Fresh scenario per the authoring rule; driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
